---
title: "Vignettes"
subtitle: "Cross-disciplinary worked examples from the workshop"
---

Vignettes document the analytical approaches developed during the workshop, combining scientific motivation, step-by-step methodology, and fully reproducible R code. Each vignette covers a specific SA–IDM integration example applied to one of the two case studies.

::: {.callout-note}
Vignettes will be added here as they are finalized during and after the workshop.
:::

## Case Study A — Natural Course of the Epidemic

*Vignettes to be added*

## Case Study B — Vaccine Efficacy

*Vignettes to be added*

## How to Contribute a Vignette

1. Create a new `.qmd` file in the `vignettes/` folder using the naming convention `vignette-[topic].qmd`
2. Write your vignette using the template below
3. Commit and push — it will appear on the site automatically

### Vignette Template

```markdown
---
title: "Your Vignette Title"
author: "Author Names"
date: today
---

## Scientific Background

## Methods

## Data

## Analysis

## Results

## Discussion and Limitations

## Session Info

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
```
